smollm2-135m.description: Smallest practical chat model; used by our integration tests, runs anywhere.

qwen3.5-0.8b.description: Tiny model from Alibaba's current generation; good edge-device default.

qwen3.5-2b.description: Most popular modern small general model; runs on CPU comfortably.

qwen3.5-4b.description: Strong multilingual small general workhorse from Alibaba.

qwen3.5-9b.description: Modern medium general model with strong tool use; 128K context.

gpt-oss-20b.description: OpenAI's open-weights release; balanced general model for ~16 GB machines.

mistral-small-3.1.description: Mistral's general 24B base model (also Devstral's foundation); broad utility.

qwen3.5-27b.description: Modern dense general 27B; the practical ceiling for most workstations.

deepseek-r1-distill-llama-8b.description: Chain-of-thought distill into Llama-8B; best small reasoning model.

phi-4-reasoning.description: Microsoft's reasoning-tuned 14B; competitive with much larger models on math/logic.

devstral-small-2507.description: Mistral's official coding-agent GGUF; #1 open-source on SWE-Bench at release.

qwen3-coder-30b-a3b.description: Qwen's MoE coder (3.3B active); strong agentic coding + 256K context.

nomic-embed-text.description: Returns 768-dim embeddings; pair with a chat model for RAG.
